headline: Transit Adjacent Development Displaces 4,500 Hawkers
context: Construction of transit-adjacent development near 3 MRT stations displaced 4,500 hawkers and small traders from established locations.

cards.big: 4,500 hawkers displaced by development near 3 MRT station areas
cards.sub: Transit construction zones eliminated street food markets operating 20-40 years

cards.big: Affected hawkers offered temporary relocation 2-3km from original sites
cards.sub: Customer traffic at temporary locations dropped 65% reducing hawker income

cards.big: Only 180 of 4,500 displaced hawkers allocated permanent space in new developments
cards.sub: Rental in new spaces averages RM2,800 monthly versus RM450 at original locations

cards.big: Developer committed to affordable hawker units but set prices above market rate
cards.sub: Community groups petitioned for hawker inclusion in TOD planning guidelines

cards.big: Hawker displacement tests whether transit development preserves or destroys local economies
4,500 hawkers displaced by transit development. Inclusive planning means protecting livelihoods near stations.
